violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Service was called back to re-clean the ice machine. Bagged ice will be used until ice machine is re-cleaned. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
The dumpster area has an accumulation of debris, making it unclear if it is placed on a solid surface. Dumpster area must be cleaned, or dumpster relocated. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
Menu does not contain an allergen statement. English Food Allergies What You Need to Know New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
Two hand-washing sinks in the kitchen were lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

The hand-washing sink at the bar was lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding food employees to wash their hands must be posted at all hand sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (mixing bowl, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals (spray bottles) taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small flies in the kitchen, dishwasher area, and back area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, waffle iron, freezers, back refrigerator, and mixer have an accumulation of dust, and/or food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

The outside dumpster side door was not closed. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The dumpster area has an accumulation of trash, litter, cardboard, and debris. Dumpster area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The insulation wrapping the tubes next to the ice machine are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer and plate) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -Flat top grill and table in the kitchen; -Plate storage shelves in the kitchen; -Lowboy door tracks in the bar area; -Fridge door tracks in the back storage area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the table beneath the flattop grill have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
Some ceiling tiles in the food prep area are in poor repair, stained with previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
